_comment: Safe default values for feature flags. At runtime, scripts read DRY_RUN from .env first, falling back to this file. Set DRY_RUN=false in .env only when you are ready to allow real writes. The Idea Brain has moved to Supabase (project `idea-brain`, ID `nifkdviqtwokroxvkxzw`). Capture and the morning brief read/write to the `ideas` table directly via Supabase. Two .env keys are required: IDEA_BRAIN_SUPABASE_URL and IDEA_BRAIN_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.
